product_highlights: EcoShield™ — biodegradable microcapsule shells for sustainable personal care
SilSoft™ — silicone-enhanced soft-shell microcapsules for sensory payoff
Pressure-activated burst-release microcapsules for leave-on and rinse-off products
Custom slurry and powder microcapsule formats for diverse application routes
notes: Encapsys is a specialty microcapsule manufacturer with decades of expertise in pressure-activated and triggered-release delivery systems for personal care, home care, and fragrance applications. Their EcoShield™ biodegradable microcapsules are an important innovation addressing the industry's movement away from microplastics in rinse-off products. Encapsys provides custom microcapsule development and manufacturing at scale, making them a versatile SKIN-TWIN partner for sensory-driven active delivery.
